Setting Static IP Address 

This packet is sent 3 times. 
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b8 02 00 00 80 11 bf ca c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb c3 bb 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 03 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 36 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 fa 08 08 04 04 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 36 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 fa
0100   08 08 04 04 00 a6 00 01 92 ff ff 28 da

And then this packet is sent 3 times
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b8 05 00 00 80 11 c0 76 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff 09 c4


--------------------------------------------------------

Setting DHCP Port 443 DNS Auto 
This packet is sent 3 times. 
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 3a 00 00 80 11 be 92 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb 60 8d 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 64 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 23 00 08
0080   08 08 08 08 08 08 04 04 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 64 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 a3 00 08 08 08 08 08
0100   08 08 04 04 00 a6 00 01 90 ff ff 26 a5


And then this packet is sent 3 times
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 3d 00 00 80 11 bf 3e c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff 09 c4



Setting DHCP Port 443 DNS Manual 
This packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 55 00 00 80 11 be 77 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb 58 1b 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 01 c0 a8 01 fa 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 01
0100   c0 a8 01 fa 00 a6 00 01 92 ff ff 2b dd

And then this packet is sent 3 times
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 58 00 00 80 11 bf 23 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff 09 c4

--------------------------------------------------------

AutoIP  IP 192.168.1.103 and auto DNS
This packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 5c 00 00 80 11 be 70 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb 54 1b 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 04 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 01 c0 a8 01 fa 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 01
0100   c0 a8 01 fa 00 a6 00 01 90 ff ff 2b df

and then this packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 5f 00 00 80 11 bf 1c c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff 09 c4

--------------------------------------------------------

AutoIP IP 192.168.1.103 and defined DNS 192.168.1.1 and 192.168.1.2
This packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 61 00 00 80 11 be 6b c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb 42 0d 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 04 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 01 c0 a8 01 02 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 01
0100   c0 a8 01 02 00 a6 00 01 92 ff ff 29 f1

And then this packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 64 00 00 80 11 bf 17 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04

--------------------------------------------------------

Auto Advanced  IP 192.168.1.103 and auto DNS
This packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 68 00 00 80 11 be 64 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb 44 0d 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 05 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 01 c0 a8 01 02 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 67 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 01
0100   c0 a8 01 02 00 a6 00 01 90 ff ff 29 f0

and then this packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 6b 00 00 80 11 bf 10 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff 09 c4

--------------------------------------------------------

Auto Advanced  IP 192.168.1.103 and Manual DNS 192.168.1.1 and 192.168.1.2
This packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 ff b9 6e 00 00 80 11 be 5e c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 eb fa c7 00 01 00 af 00 02
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 01 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 05 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 0a 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 23 00 08
0080   c0 a8 01 01 c0 a8 01 02 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 0a 00 a1 00 04 ff ff ff 00
00f0   00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 01 00 a3 00 08 c0 a8 01 01
0100   c0 a8 01 02 00 a6 00 01 92 ff ff 29 38

And then this packet is sent 3 times.
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff a0 29 19 3e ab 91 08 00 45 00
0010   00 50 b9 72 00 00 80 11 bf 09 c0 a8 01 79 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ae 00 3c fe 4a 00 01 00 00 00 04
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 02 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 00
